name: cadre-runtime
description: TypeScript-built runtime scripts for Cadre LSP and MCP tooling.

scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:runtime && bash scripts/generate-skills.sh --check && pnpm test
scripts.test: node --test scripts/source-architecture.test.js scripts/cadre-core.test.js scripts/mcp/cadre-server.test.js scripts/protocol-packet-only.test.js && node scripts/cadre-team-scale-sim.js
